Timeline

    Week 1 · Mon–Tue

    Schema & API contract

    New comments and comment_reads tables, migrations, and the tRPC router stubs.

    packages/db packages/api migration 0042
    Week 2 · Wed–Fri

    UI polish & edge cases

    Thread nesting, optimistic updates, and empty-state screens.

    packages/ui ux
    Week 3 · Mon

    Ship to beta

    Feature flag enabled for 10% of users.

    release beta
